Class TextComponent

java.lang.Object
io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.Component
io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.components.TextComponent
public class TextComponent extends Component
Represents a simple text display. Provides methods for setting the displayed text, the color of the displayed text, and the font of the displayed text.
See Also:
  • Component

  • Constructor Details

    • TextComponent

      public TextComponent(String text, Color color, Font font)
      Constructs a text component which displays the given text.
      Parameters:
      text - the displayed text
      color - the color of the displayed text
      font - the font of the displayed text
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if the input text, color, or font is null

      public void render(Graphics2D g)
      Renders the text.
      Overrides:
      render in class Component
      Parameters:
      g - the graphics context to render on

    • setText

      public TextComponent setText(String text)
      Sets the displayed text to the given text.
      Parameters:
      text - the new displayed text
      Returns:
      this
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if the input text is null

    • setColor

      public TextComponent setColor(Color color)
      Sets the color of the displayed text to the given color.
      Parameters:
      color - the new color of the displayed text
      Returns:
      this
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if the input color is null

    • setFont

      public TextComponent setFont(Font font)
      Sets the font of the displayed text to the given font.
      Parameters:
      font - the new font of the displayed text
      Returns:
      this
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if the input font is null
